title: Spawn Eggs
description: Adds spawn eggs for any entity to the game. Includes some extra tweaks such as spawning in mid-air, toggleable consumption and blacklist.
body:
### Description :
Adds spawn eggs for any entity to the game. Includes some extra tweaks such as spawning in mid-air, toggleable consumption and blacklist. 

### Features :
- Configrable blacklist (defaults to few entities which don't spawn anyway or crash the game)
- Option to enable spawning mobs at the payer position when not aiming at any block and right-clicking
- Option to toggle if the egg should get consumed when used
- Toggle between 3 textures (New One, Old Placeholder One, Vanilla Egg) *[Modloader Only]*
-  Dev Sword called Miloš which has 9000 damage and when right-clicked will kill all loaded entities except items, if shift-right-clicked it will also delete items
- Localization for Spawn Eggs either with registry names or custom localization *[Fabric Only]*
- Colored Spawn Eggs with custom colors for each entity *[Fabric Only]*
- Creative Tab for Spawn Eggs when using the Beta Horizons Creative mod *[Fabric Only]*
- Ability to change Spawner entity using a Spawn Egg *[Fabric Only]*

### Video :
